title: Checkout API returns HTTP 500 after canary deploy
body: Starting at 02:14 UTC, the checkout API in prod-us-east is returning 500s for roughly 18 percent of requests after the checkout-service canary. Error rate is still rising and customer orders are failing.

title: Latency spike in reporting jobs for eu-west
body: P95 latency for reporting jobs in eu-west exceeded 2.4 seconds for 15 minutes. No customer errors yet, but dashboards show sustained queue growth.
